page.title: Register Tone and Paraphrase
page.subtitle_html: Register Tone and Paraphrase - C1 formal tone, neutral phrasing, and controlled sentence rewriting.
page.subtitle_text: C1 formal tone, neutral phrasing, and controlled sentence rewriting.

blocks.body: {"level":"C1","intro":"Register Tone and Paraphrase: compact anchors for shifting meaning into a controlled formal register.","rules":[{"label":"Formal tone","text":"Replace casual wording with precise neutral or formal alternatives.","example":"We would like to obtain further information about the results."},{"label":"Paraphrase","text":"Keep meaning stable while changing grammar, vocabulary, or information structure.","example":"The findings suggest that further analysis is required."},{"label":"Tone control","text":"Adjust certainty, politeness, and distance according to academic or professional context.","example":"It may be advisable to reconsider the proposal."}]}

blocks.heading: C1 focus
blocks.body: This compact page exists as the theory anchor for the English Sentence Builder C1 register tone and paraphrase lesson package.
